headline: Stay updated with the S&P500 stocks that are on the move in today's after-hours session.
summary: The regular session of the US market on Wednesday is now over, but let's get a preview of the after-hours session and explore the top S&P500 gainers and losers driving the post-market movements.

headline: Bank of New York Mellon Corp (NYSE:BK) Screens as a Perfect Technical Breakout Setup
summary: BANK OF NEW YORK MELLON (BK) shows a perfect technical breakout setup with 10/10 ratings for uptrend strength and consolidation pattern, trading near a $136.33 resistance zone with defined entry and stop-loss levels.
